description: Add billing warning UI after shared billing status groundwork.

userStories.title: Expose shared billing status model
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want one shared billing status model so settings surfaces agree on billing state.

userStories.title: Show billing threshold warning
userStories.description: As a workspace owner, I want threshold warnings on billing settings so I can react before service interruption.
acceptanceCriteria: Threshold warning appears on billing settings page
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show billing retry banner
userStories.description: As a workspace owner, I want retry guidance on billing settings so I know how to recover failed payments.
acceptanceCriteria: Retry banner appears on billing settings page
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Emit billing warning analytics
userStories.description: As an operator, I want analytics for billing warnings so support can monitor alert frequency.
acceptanceCriteria: Analytics event is emitted for warning impressions
